title: Sneaky warning: 'a Surgeon General' instead of 'the Surgeon General' (low-light, level 10, sideways)
image_prompt: Photorealistic tall sleek bottle with a dark blue velvet label. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'Velvet Sky', 'Vodka', '40% Alc./Vol.', '750 mL', 'Produced and bottled by Sky Spirits, Los Angeles, CA'. Include a separate paragraph in small print: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to a Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.'
visualObservation: Visual note: label photo is severe underexposed and noisy. Camera orientation is sideways (90 degrees). The photo is sideways and may need rotation before automated approval.
